_comment: Configuration for the daily auto-fetch agent (fetch_latest.py). The agent ONLY downloads from hosts in allow_hosts, and only accepts a PDF that passes full validation. Add the real daily-PDF URL pattern to direct_url_templates once you know it (placeholders: {Y}=year, {m}=2-digit month, {d}=2-digit day). scan_pages are official index pages crawled for links to a newer daily PDF.
